eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Clackamas; Columbia; Multnomah; Washington, OR; Clark, WA; at 9:32 AM on JUL 2, 2019 Effective until 10:32 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required weekly test of the Emergency Alert System issued by Clackamas County in Oregon.
